title: glischrocaryon baeuerlenii
intro: Glischrocaryon baeuerlenii, also known as the Australian water fern, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocharitaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Glischrocaryon baeuerlenii include reducing inflammation, promoting tissue repair, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
